name: Model Health Dashboard
description: Prediction score distribution drift and mean absolute SHAP values for model explainability.

cards.name: Prediction Score Distribution (30d)
cards.query: SELECT width_bucket(fraud_probability, 0.0, 1.0, 10) * 0.1 AS probability_bin, COUNT(*) AS prediction_count FROM predictions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY probability_bin ORDER BY probability_bin

cards.name: Mean Absolute SHAP Importances (Top 10)
cards.query: SELECT feature_name, AVG(abs(shap_value)) AS mean_abs_shap FROM shap_explanations GROUP BY feature_name ORDER BY mean_abs_shap DESC LIMIT 10
